sections.label: HOW IT WORKS
sections.heading: From messy process to a working system your team can actually use.

steps.title: Audit the bottlenecks
steps.description: We start by understanding where your current tools, manual work, and internal processes are slowing growth, creating errors, or wasting time.

steps.title: Design the right solution
steps.description: Then we map the simplest useful system—whether that means custom software, AI-assisted workflows, integrations, or a combination of all three.

steps.title: Build around your team
steps.description: Fabrika develops the product around the people who will actually use it, so adoption is built into the solution instead of treated as an afterthought.

steps.title: Improve as you grow
steps.description: Once the core system is live, we keep iterating so your software continues to support new processes, automation opportunities, and scale.

sections.tagline: Good custom software should make the business feel simpler, clearer, and easier to run—not more technical.

sections.heading: Fabrika is a strong fit for companies that are *outgrowing generic tools* but are not ready to waste time on enterprise complexity.

items.title: BEST FIT
items.subtitle: Small and mid-sized businesses with real workflow pain
items.description: You have recurring operational friction, disconnected tools, or manual processes holding back growth—and you want a partner who can translate that mess into usable software.

items.title: NOT IDEAL
items.subtitle: Teams looking for another off-the-shelf subscription
items.description: If your process is already well served by standard SaaS or you only want the cheapest short-term workaround, custom software may not be the right move yet.

cta.label: See If Fabrika Fits Your Workflow

sections.heading: Questions teams usually ask before building custom software
sections.subheading: These are the concerns we hear most often from companies considering custom software or AI for the first time.

items.question: How do I know if we really need custom software?
items.answer: If your team is constantly stitching together spreadsheets, multiple SaaS tools, manual approvals, and one-off workarounds, custom software may be the cleaner long-term solution. The goal is not to replace tools for fun—it is to remove recurring friction that keeps costing the business time and momentum.

items.question: What if we are unsure where AI actually fits?
items.answer: That is normal. Fabrika does not force AI into places it does not belong. We look for the workflows where AI can realistically reduce admin, speed up decisions, or support the team—then build from there.

items.question: We already use a lot of software. Can Fabrika still help?
items.answer: Yes. Often the issue is not a total lack of tooling—it is that the tools do not connect well or were never designed for your exact workflow. Fabrika can help consolidate, integrate, or build around the gaps.

items.question: Will our team need a lot of training?
items.answer: The aim is the opposite. Fabrika builds around how your team already works so the finished system feels intuitive. Good software should reduce training overhead, not increase it.

items.question: Is custom software only for large companies?
items.answer: No. In many cases, smaller and mid-sized businesses benefit the most because the right system can unlock capacity quickly. Fabrika specifically positions itself for growing companies that need leverage without enterprise bloat.

items.question: What happens after the first version is launched?
items.answer: Launch is the start, not the finish line. Once the core system is working, Fabrika can keep iterating with you so the software evolves alongside the business instead of becoming outdated six months later.

sections.heading: If your team is held together by workarounds, it’s probably time to build the system you actually need.
sections.subheading: Book a strategy call with Fabrika and we’ll help you identify where custom software or AI can remove the most friction first.
sections.caption: No vague discovery fluff—just a practical conversation about your workflows, bottlenecks, and what is worth building next.

sections.heading: Start with a quick qualification form
sections.subheading: Tell us a bit about your business, your workflow bottlenecks, and what you want to improve. If it’s a fit, you’ll be able to book time with Fabrika right away.
